case_title: ED PORTUGAL VS. MV TRANSPORTATION et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT TO UNVERIFIED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MV TRANSPORTATION
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED BY THE DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT MV TRANSPORTATION JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTUGAL, ED AS TO DEFENDANT MV TRANSPORTATION DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE AUG-15-2002.

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY HELFAND, STEVEN

ARBITRATOR FREEMAN DUVAL CULLOM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-21-2002 THROUGH NOV-19-2002.
